zh.Hornby Castle, Yorkshire, England: 英國越可爾宏比 卡素
zh.South Cowton, Yorkshire, England: 英國越可爾素斯 考福頓
zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Richard Conyers of South Cowton於大約1426年出生在英國越可爾時，他的父親Sir Christopher Conyers44歲，母親Ellyn Rolleston30歲。他於1448年與Alice Wycliffe在英國越可爾結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和4個女兒的父母。他去世於1490年2月20日在英國奧可福爾享年65歲。

zh-hans.Hornby Castle, Yorkshire, England: 英国越可爾宏比 卡素
zh-hans.South Cowton, Yorkshire, England: 英国越可爾素斯 考福頓
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir Richard Conyers of South Cowton于大约1426年出生在英国越可爾时，他的父亲Sir Christopher Conyers44岁，母亲Ellyn Rolleston30岁。他于1448年与Alice Wycliffe在英国越可爾结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和4个女儿的父母。他去世于1490年2月20日在英国奧可福爾享年65岁。

nameMeanings.name: Conyers
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (Yorkshire, of Norman origin): habitational name from either of two places in northern France, Coignières in Seine-et-Oise or Cogners in Sarthe. Alternatively, a variant of Conyer , with genitival or post-medieval excrescent -s.

variants.name: Conyer
meanings: English: occupational name for a minter, a coiner of money, from an agent derivative of Old French coignier ‘to stamp money, to mint’.

nameMeanings.name: Richard
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the most enduringly successful of the Old French personal names introduced into Britain by the Normans. It is of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from rīc ‘power’ + hard ‘strong, hardy’. It has enjoyed continuous popularity in England from the Conquest to the present day, influenced by the fact that it was borne by three kings of England, in particular Richard I ( 1157–99 ). He was king for only ten years ( 1189–99 ), most of which he spent in warfare abroad, taking part in the Third Crusade and costing the people of England considerable sums in taxes. Nevertheless, he achieved the status of a folk hero, and was never in England long enough to disappoint popular faith in his goodness and justice. He was also Duke of Aquitaine and Normandy and Count of Anjou, fiefs which he held at a time of maximum English expansion in France. His exploits as a leader of the Third Crusade earned him the nickname ‘Coeur de Lion’ or ‘Lionheart’ and a permanent place in popular imagination, in which he was even more firmly enshrined by Sir Walter Scott's novel Ivanhoe ( 1820 ).

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Richard Conyers of South Cowton was born about 1426, in Yorkshire, England, his father, Sir Christopher Conyers, was 44 and his mother, Ellyn Rolleston, was 30. He married Alice Wycliffe in 1448, in Yorkshire, England. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 4 daughters. He died on 20 February 1490, in Oxfordshire, England, at the age of 65.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir Richard Conyers of South Cowton est né environ 1426, à Everwyck, Angleterre, son père, Sir Christopher Conyers, avait 44 ans et sa mère, Ellyn Rolleston, avait 30 ans. Il a épousé Alice Wycliffe en 1448, à Everwyck, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 4 filles. Il est décédé le 20 février 1490, à Oxfordshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 65 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir Richard Conyers of South Cowton um 1426 in Yorkshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir Christopher Conyers 44 und seine Mutter Ellyn Rolleston 30. Er hat 1448 in Yorkshire, England Alice Wycliffe geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 4 Töchter. Er starb am 20. Februar 1490 im Alter von 65 Jahren in Oxfordshire, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Richard Conyers of South Cowton è nato il circa 1426 nel Yorkshire, England, il suo padre, Sir Christopher Conyers, aveva 44 anni e il suo madre, Ellyn Rolleston, aveva 30 anni. Lui sposato Alice Wycliffe nel 1448, nel Yorkshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 4 figlie. Morì il 20 febbraio 1490, nel Oxfordshire, England, all'età di 65 anni.

ja.South Cowton, Yorkshire, England: イギリスヨークシュアイアソウス コウトン
ja.lifeSummary: Sir Richard Conyers of South Cowtonが約1426年にイギリスヨークシュアイアで生まれた時，父Sir Christopher Conyersは44歳，母Ellyn Rollestonは30歳であった。1448年にイギリスヨークシュアイアでAlice Wycliffeと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼は1490年2月20日にイギリスオクスフォードシュアイアで65歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir Richard Conyers of South Cowton(이)가 대략 1426년 영국 요르크실르에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir Christopher Conyers(은)는 44세였고, 그의 어머니 Ellyn Rolleston(은)는 30세였다. 그는 1448년 영국 요르크실르에서 Alice Wycliffe(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1490년 2월 20일 영국 스퍼드실르에서 65세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Richard Conyers of South Cowton nasceu aproximadamente 1426, em Yorkshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir Christopher Conyers, tinha 44 anos e sua mãe, Ellyn Rolleston, tinha 30 anos. Ele casou-se com Alice Wycliffe em 1448, em Yorkshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 4 filhas. Ele faleceu em 20 de fevereiro de 1490, em Oxfordshire, Inglaterra, com 65 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir Richard Conyers of South Cowton родился около 1426 г. в местности еркшир, Англия, его отцу по имени Sir Christopher Conyers было 44 года, а матери, которую звали Ellyn Rolleston, 30. Он женился на женщине по имени Alice Wycliffe в 1448 г. в местности еркшир, Англия. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 4 дочери. Он умер 20 февраля 1490 г. в местности оксфордшир, Англия в возрасте 65 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir Richard Conyers of South Cowton nació aproximadamente 1426, en Yorkshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Sir Christopher Conyers, tenía 44 años y su mamá, Ellyn Rolleston, tenía 30 años. Se casó con Alice Wycliffe en 1448, en Yorkshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 4 hijas. Murió el 20 de febrero de 1490, en Oxfordshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 65 años.
